senses.gloss: elative degree of خَطِر (ḵaṭir), elative degree of خَطِير (ḵaṭīr):; more dangerous, riskier; most dangerous, riskiest
elative degree of خَطِر (ḵaṭir), elative degree of خَطِير (ḵaṭīr):; more serious; most serious
elative degree of خَطِر (ḵaṭir), elative degree of خَطِير (ḵaṭīr):; more important; most important
elative degree of خَطِر (ḵaṭir), elative degree of خَطِير (ḵaṭīr):; more eminent; most eminent
to inform, to notify, to alert

etymology.text: Elative of خَطِر (ḵaṭir, “dangerous, risky, serious, important, eminent”) and خَطِير (ḵaṭīr, “(same)”).
